steps.description: From the Trailhead unit, use Launch / Launch Playground (or connect your own Developer Edition) so you have an org where you can run Apex and SOQL.
In Salesforce Setup or App Launcher, open Developer Console (or VS Code with Salesforce Extensions) linked to the same org.
Follow the unit's hands-on steps in the org (classes, anonymous Apex, or Lightning components as directed). Complete the Trailhead challenge in the browser when you are done.
